input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Mount Sinai Hospital. There are 6 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "neuro", "count": 3, "message": "3 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 880, "current_utilization": 12, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Mount Sinai Hospital has 6 incoming patients. Activate Stroke Code Readiness protocols due to a cluster of 3 incoming neuro patients. Capacity is stable for the next two hours, with no diversion recommendations needed at this time.
